description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel and receiver are metallic, likely steel, with a polished finish, while the stock and fore-end are made of dark, varnished wood. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a smooth transition for operation. The shotgun's overall design is streamlined, with minimal external embellishments, and the barrel is unvented and of uniform diameter. The object appears robust and functional, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a polished metal barrel and dark wooden full stock, featuring a rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever. The design is classic and streamlined, with a long, unvented barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the wooden stock and metallic barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and unvented with no visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated with the lever, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
